dct_description_sm: New York City NYPD Arrest Data, 2010 is a point theme representing every New York Police Department Arrest in the year 2010. This dataset was derived from NYC Open Data (https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Public-Safety/NYPD-Arrests-Data-Historic-/8h9b-rp9u) in August 2023. Each record represents an arrest effected in NYC by the NYPD and includes information about the type of crime, the location and time of enforcement. In addition, information related to suspect demographics is also included. Columbia Libraries staff extracted each half year's records and converted them to geopackage format by state plane x/y coordinates. Some records may geolocation information, and they have coordinates 0,0. In some cases, for years from 2006-2012, some arrests have locations outside of the city (usually to the North) - they are presented here as encoded from the NYPD. Columbia Libraries staff has provided the data in the geopackage format, and a codebook and a has been included in the download package.
